verification_questions.question: Does pages/groups.tsx detect join, admin, and name query params and render JoinRequestCard instead of the normal groups view?
verification_questions.evidence: groups.tsx extracts joinNonce, joinAdmin, joinName from router.query. If all three are present, renders <JoinRequestCard> before checking for id param.

verification_questions.question: Does JoinRequestCard show the group name and a 'Request to Join' button?
verification_questions.evidence: JoinRequestCard.tsx renders groupName in bold, copy.groups.joinRequestButton on the button, with data-testid='join-request-send-btn'.

verification_questions.question: Does buildJoinRequestRumor construct a kind 21059 rumor with correct content (type, nonce, name) and p-tag targeting the admin?
verification_questions.evidence: joinRequestSender.ts buildJoinRequestRumor sets kind: 21059, tags: [['p', adminPubkeyHex]], content: JSON.stringify({ type: 'join_request', nonce, name }). 6 unit tests confirm.

verification_questions.question: Does the NIP-59 gift wrap use two-layer encryption (seal with real key, wrap with ephemeral key)?
verification_questions.evidence: buildGiftWrap() encrypts rumor→seal (kind 13) using signer.nip44.encrypt, then encrypts seal→giftWrap (kind 1059) using ephemeral key via nip44.v2.encrypt with getConversationKey.

verification_questions.question: Does JoinRequestCard handle already-a-member and identity-not-ready edge cases?
verification_questions.evidence: Component checks hydrated/pubkeyHex for identity readiness, checks groups for matching admin+self membership to show 'already a member' with link to group.

verification_questions.question: Are all UI strings added to both en and de translations in i18n.ts?
verification_questions.evidence: 7 new keys (joinRequestHeading, joinRequestDescription, joinRequestButton, joinRequestSent, joinRequestError, joinRequestAlreadyMember, joinRequestGoToGroup) in type, en, and de.

verification_questions.question: Are rumor construction and query param detection covered by unit tests?
verification_questions.evidence: joinRequestSender.test.ts: 8 tests covering kind, pubkey, p-tag, content JSON, created_at, type field, and query param detection.

verification_questions.question: Does the build pass with all changes?
verification_questions.evidence: make build succeeds, static export generated. make test-unit: 19 files, 268 tests all passing.
